objective: Roll out the governance-owned structured agent cycle plan standard across governed repos without breaking repo-specific execution lanes, and record the landed adoption state in governance.
scope_boundary: Pin governed repos to the reviewed governance-check workflow SHA that contains the canonical structured-plan validator.
Add explicit repo-level structured-plan adoption guidance where the contract was previously implicit or missing.
Document HealthcarePlatform's repo-local schema/template as a compatibility shim aligned to the governance-owned field contract.
Record rollout evidence and any newly surfaced follow-up work before closing the governance issue.
out_of_scope: Replacing HealthcarePlatform's Phase 8 artifact path with the generic docs/plans path.
Changing the canonical governance schema fields introduced in issue #67.
Adding new repo-local schema validators to non-HealthcarePlatform repos.
research_summary: HealthcarePlatform already enforced a repo-local structured-cycle lane whose local schema fields matched the governance-owned schema exactly, so the correct move was a documented compatibility shim instead of a disruptive migration. ai-integration-services, knocktracker, and local-ai-machine already consumed the reusable governance workflow but needed explicit structured-plan instructions and normalized workflow SHA pinning. ASC-Evaluator had no governance workflow caller yet and needed both the pinned reusable workflow and structured-plan adoption guidance. During rollout, local-ai-machine's riskfix branch contract and ai-integration-services' existing governance doc contract surfaced additional in-slice fixes that were completed before closeout.

sprints.name: Sprint 1
sprints.goal: Roll out the shared validator caller and explicit structured-plan startup guidance in the governed repos that lacked a complete contract.
tasks: Pin ai-integration-services, knocktracker, and local-ai-machine governance workflow callers to the reviewed governance commit containing the validator.
Add a reusable governance workflow caller to ASC-Evaluator.
Add explicit structured-plan guidance to repo startup docs for AIS, knocktracker, local-ai-machine, and ASC-Evaluator.
acceptance_criteria: Governed repos consuming the reusable workflow point at the reviewed governance SHA containing the structured-plan validator.
ASC-Evaluator gains a reusable governance gate.
Repo startup guidance names where structured-plan artifacts should live and that the governance-owned schema is canonical.

sprints.name: Sprint 2
sprints.goal: Document HealthcarePlatform compatibility, absorb rollout-discovered fixes, and close governance with actual merged evidence.
tasks: Document HealthcarePlatform's repo-local schema/template as a compatibility shim aligned to the governance-owned field contract.
Fix rollout-discovered blockers in ai-integration-services and local-ai-machine rather than leaving them as hidden drift.
Update governance backlog and PDCA/R closeout with the merged repo PR evidence and any additional follow-up issue.
acceptance_criteria: HealthcarePlatform documents the compatibility shim instead of silently forking the field contract.
All targeted repo rollout PRs merge successfully.
Governance closeout records merged PR evidence and any newly surfaced follow-up issue before closure.

specialist_reviews.focus: Validate that the rollout should prefer workflow pinning, startup guidance, and a documented HealthcarePlatform compatibility shim instead of attempting a disruptive cross-repo process rewrite.
specialist_reviews.summary: HealthcarePlatform already matched the canonical required fields, so a compatibility shim was the lowest-risk path. The other repos only needed explicit contract adoption and reviewed workflow pins.

specialist_reviews.focus: Ensure the slice absorbs rollout-discovered blockers instead of claiming success while repo PRs are still failing.
specialist_reviews.summary: The rollout exposed two real blockers: ai-integration-services needed existing governance doc metadata/progress alignment, and local-ai-machine required both a documented progress update and a riskfix branch to satisfy its own repo gate. Both were fixed in-slice before closeout.

alternate_model_review.summary: This slice is bounded rollout/adoption work and did not require a separate alternate-model review to proceed.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implementation is approved for repo caller pinning, startup guidance updates, HealthcarePlatform compatibility documentation, and any in-slice blocker fixes required to get the rollout PRs merged.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Record merged repo PR evidence in governance, add the worktree dependency-symlink review item as a follow-up backlog issue, and merge the governance closeout branch.

material_deviation_rules: If any governed repo cannot consume the shared validator without additional repo-specific automation, create an explicit follow-up issue before closing.
If HealthcarePlatform local schema fields diverge from the governance-owned schema, stop and reconcile that divergence in the same slice or create a blocker issue.
If rollout testing surfaces another required repo-side fix, absorb it in the current action or create an issue-backed follow-up before closure.
